zh.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Dutton於1457年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，她的父親Peter Dutton29歲，母親Elizabeth Grosvenor27歲。她於大約1481年與Sir George Calveley在英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 南特維其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年2月5日在英國爾麗婭 白 南特維其享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Dutton was born in 1457, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter Dutton, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Grosvenor, was 27. She married Sir George Calveley about 1481, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 5 February 1516, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Dutton est née en 1457, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Dutton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grosvenor, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Calveley environ 1481, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1516, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 난트위치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dutton(이)가 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Dutton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Grosvenor(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 Sir George Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 2월 5일 영국 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Dutton nasceu em 1457, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Dutton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grosvenor, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Calveley aproximadamente 1481, em Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1516, em Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Dutton родилась в 1457 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter Dutton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grosvenor, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Calveley около 1481 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 5 февраля 1516 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
